channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cluster of deep potholes, 1st April
item.description:
Hazard to pedestrians and cyclists. Unusually deep potholes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-20, Farringdon Lane, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots on the grass and in the bushes please clear before the Bank Holiday weekend thanks!, 1st April
item.description:
Lots on the grass and in the bushes in front of Markey Meadow.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Meadow, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spilled in road and tyre tracks spreading it, 1st April
item.description:
Outside 85 Langbrook road a large pot of paint spilled in road cars have driven through it and steaks up the street. Please could a jet washer or road sweeper try and clean it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Langbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter along the alley way and in the bushes please clear before the Bank Holiday weekend thanks!, 1st April
item.description:
Lots of litter along the alley way and in the bushes please clear before the Bank Holiday weekend thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, old furniture and suitcase, 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by bins for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dove Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 1st April
item.description:
This mattress turned up here last week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 1st April
item.description:
Company based at the bottom of Craven Walk Again more rubbish has been dumped outside our business. Is this a local point for rubbish? Our vehicles have difficulty gaining access to our property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on path, 1st April
item.description:
Cannot believe how the dustman have left this! Couldn't even be bothered to pick a few bits of litter up while emptying the recycling bins. This is pure laziness!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Fairway, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of large amount of toys, 1st April
item.description:
Dumped Woom bike box and lots of toys.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Barnwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littered street, 1st April
item.description:
Litter in gutter along Combermere rd, especially outside Lansdowne school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant fly tipping from 5 Gloucester drive, 1st April
item.description:
Repeated fly tipping for 5 Gloucester drive. Weekly issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping all over Mount Pleasant Lane, 1st April
item.description:
Fly tipping all by orthodox Jewish households on Mt Pleasant Ln. Despite council leaflets clearly stating fly tipping is illegal and they must book bulky waste collection. Please sort out ASAP and hold them accountable. Disgusting and blocks pavements.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Bag of rubbish on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter alleyway adjoining 20 Albion Grove considerable amount of rubbish in the area., 1st April
item.description:
Excessive litter alleyway adjoining 20 Albion Grove considerable amount of rubbish in the area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike is looking pretty broken and abandoned, 1st April
item.description:
Fold up bars mechanism might be broken, lost back wheel, gear mechanism looks a bit crushed at back wheel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Kingsland High Street, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Malvern Road, 1st April
item.description:
The road is still unswept filth everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Alleyway, 1st April
item.description:
Discarded printer in the alleyway between Nigel and stenhall. Thanks in advance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Nigel Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 1st April
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped by entrance, 1st April
item.description:
Duvet has been dumped outside my entrance for two weeks. Not able to clear it myself because it doesnt fit in my bin. A lot of people dump their rubbish in this spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 1st April
item.description:
Someone hasn't cleaned up after their dog
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piquet Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
